ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment round */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the investment round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of investment round (e.g., Seed, Series A, B, C) */,
  "num_investors" INTEGER /* Number of investors participating in the round */,
  "money_raised" TEXT /* Total money raised in the round */,
  "lead_investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead investor involved */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup receiving the funding */,
  "valuation" TEXT /* Pre-money valuation of the startup */,
  "post_money_valuation" TEXT /* Post-money valuation of the startup */,
  "equity_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of equity received by investors */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the investment round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_lead_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor or investment firm */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., Individual, Venture Capital, Angel) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the investor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the investor */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Brief description of the investor's investment strategy */,
  "focus_areas" TEXT /* Industry sectors or specific areas the investor focuses on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "startup_name" TEXT /* Name of the startup */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the startup */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the startup was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the startup */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the startup (e.g., Seed, Early, Growth, Late) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the startup */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the startup */,
  "last_funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding round */,
  "last_valuation" TEXT /* Valuation of the startup in the last funding round */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the startup (e.g., Active, Acquired, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_startup_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment round */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup receiving the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_startup_mapping_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_startup_mapping_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor managing the portfolio */,
  "total_invested" TEXT /* Total amount invested across all rounds */,
  "total_startups" INTEGER /* Total number of startups in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current estimated value of the portfolio */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* Calculated return on investment for the portfolio */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is analyzed */,
  "total_invested" TEXT /* Total amount invested in that year */,
  "average_round_size" TEXT /* Average size of investment rounds for that year */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of investment rounds in the year */,
  "max_investment" TEXT /* Maximum amount invested in a single round in the year */,
  "min_investment" TEXT /* Minimum amount invested in a single round in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_trends_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, partner, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access to the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_investors" (
  "lead_investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead investor entry */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor acting as the lead */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment round being led */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_investors_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_investors_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor */,
  "total_invested" TEXT /* Total amount invested by the investor */,
  "num_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds participated in by the investor */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current estimated value of the investments */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* Calculated return on investment for the investor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the investment summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_summary_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)
